composition_hallucination_bench.description: Composition Hallucination Benchmark: 40 canonical English cases (20 synthetic, 20 adapted-real), 40 pt-BR draft translations, 40 experimental CKF-compatible exports, and a Python evaluation runner. Authored by CKF Research and Paulo Tomazinho.
composition_hallucination_bench.citation: Tomazinho, P. (2026). Composition Hallucination in Retrieval-Augmented Generation: A Failure Mode and Benchmark Protocol. CKF Research.
